comment: Protean default seccomp profile (defense-in-depth). defaultAction=ALLOW so it does not disturb JVM/Spring/Tomcat startup, while — separately from what cap-drop already blocks — denying dangerous syscalls once more at the seccomp level with EPERM. Baseline for untrusted-tier container workers.

syscalls.comment: Privilege-escalation / container-escape / memory-corruption / symlink-attack syscalls. A normal JVM workload does not use them.
